title: The Enigmatic Nazca Lines from Ancient Peru

scenes.text: Gigantic geoglyphs etched into the desert floor leave us wondering why.
The Nazca Lines stretch across the Nazca Desert in Peru.
They were created between 500 BC and AD 500, but their purpose is still debated.
Some theorize they were astronomical markers or religious symbols.
scenes.label: ASTRONOMICAL ALIGNMENT?

scenes.text: Follow if the unknown keeps you up at night.

description: 📍 Nazca, Peru - 500 BC to AD 500. The Nazca Lines, colossal geoglyphs carved into the ground, have sparked various theories about their purpose, but questions remain unanswered. Follow for daily mysteries!
